mnemonics: CAP-IT: Calculate, Analyze, Project, Implement, Test
keyPoints: Demand forecasting is critical for resource allocation
Scalability must be built into the architecture from the start
Regular performance monitoring prevents future bottlenecks
commonMistakes: Underestimating user growth leading to system overload
Focusing only on current needs without planning for future expansion
Ignoring non-functional requirements like performance and scalability
